Hero.subtitle: We build permanent estates in the digital world.

Manifesto.subtitle: We are not here to crack codes; we are here to rewrite industry rules.
Manifesto.intro_text: Enigma Software is a next-generation tech studio built to solve chronic problems in traditional industries, digitalize sluggish workflows, and simplify complex operations with a single click. For us, every industry is an ecosystem waiting to be optimized; every business problem is a code meant to be deciphered.
Manifesto.card_1_desc: We detect time losses across sectors and transform workflows into seamless automation.
Manifesto.card_2_desc: We offer advanced tech without massive costs through flexible, budget-friendly SaaS models.
Manifesto.card_3_desc: Instead of clunky systems, we build modern architectures to create lightning-fast solutions.
Manifesto.card_4_desc: Staying one step ahead of trends, we introduce our partners to the technology of tomorrow.
Manifesto.footer_quote: We are not just a software vendor; we are the strongest technology partner on your digital transformation journey. Engineering behind the unseen, simplicity within complexity.
Manifesto.seoDescription: Enigma Software is a global technology agency that aims to build permanent estates in the digital world, providing high-quality software and digital transformation services.

SplitSection.description: Every second you don't transition to digital, your customer becomes your competitor's. Or vice versa.
SplitSection.card_1_title: 01 // Your Boundaries in the Digital World
SplitSection.card_1_desc: You might have the best product or service in the world; but without the right digital storefront, you'll only spin in your own circle. With Next.js and modern web technologies, we don't just make your business accessible; we give it a fast, prestigious digital identity at global standards.
SplitSection.card_2_title: 02 // On Every Screen, By Their Side at All Times
SplitSection.card_2_desc: The world now revolves around mobile. Every moment you can't reach your users' pockets means leaving a massive market to your competitors. We make your business accessible at any moment with high-performance mobile apps for iOS and Android, compatible with various devices and fully managed store processes.
SplitSection.card_3_desc: Relying on platforms where you constantly pay high commissions is like being a tenant in your own business. We build your digital store with secure, fast, and scalable e-commerce infrastructures tailored to your needs. Take all control and revenue into your own hands.
SplitSection.card_4_title: 04 // Custom SaaS Solutions for Your Business
SplitSection.card_4_desc: Don't get stuck in the limits of off-the-shelf software. We develop web-based (SaaS) management panels and automations that will lighten your company's operational load, move your processes to the cloud, and allow you to manage your business from anywhere. Write your own rules.
SplitSection.card_5_desc: Excel spreadsheets, manual data entries, and operations prone to human error slow down your business. We integrate smart code blocks into your systems and build AI solutions that analyze your data and completely take over routine tasks. You focus on the vision, let the system handle the routine work.

Portfolio.title: Enigma
Portfolio.subtitle: Permanent projects we've built in the digital world
Portfolio.security_restriction: Cannot be viewed due to security
Portfolio.item_1_description: A web solution with an integrated booking infrastructure, enabling centralized management of private yacht charter processes and fleet data.
Portfolio.item_2_description: A boutique hotel platform equipped with a zero-commission booking engine, designed specifically to handle direct room sales and online occupancy management.
Portfolio.item_3_description: A high-performance corporate showcase platform structured to present Sedirkon's production vision and brand identity to the global market. (Under active development 🚧)
Portfolio.item_4_description: An up-to-date job and internship platform developed specifically for students and alumni of Konya Technical University Technical Sciences Vocational School.
Portfolio.item_5_description: Academic Exam Analysis and Evaluation System developed for Konya Technical University. It operates as an internal closed-circuit system due to security and privacy reasons.

Footer.description_1: We build fast, secure and scalable digital infrastructures.
Footer.description_2: Because the future only works properly with code.

Solutions.subtitle: // Listing system solutions and active operations.
Solutions.sol_01_desc: Fast and SEO-friendly websites that explain your company's vision, projects, and services.
Solutions.sol_02_desc: Custom management panels where you can easily update all texts, images, and references on your site without knowing any code.
Solutions.sol_03_desc: Conversion-oriented web tools that protect your ad budget and direct the visitor to fill out a form or contact you directly.
Solutions.sol_04_desc: Cloud platforms that allow you to track customer meetings, proposals given, projects, and your team's daily tasks from a single center.
Solutions.sol_05_desc: Smart calendars that allow your customers to see available hours and book appointments, or customer service panels where they can open fault/support requests.
Solutions.sol_06_desc: Software that digitizes manually executed tasks such as personnel leave approvals, daily task distributions, and document tracking, eliminating human error.
Solutions.sol_07_desc: Brand-specific iOS and Android apps where your customers can track their orders/appointments and be notified of campaigns with instant notifications.
Solutions.sol_08_desc: Industrial mobile solutions that provide fast barcode/QR reading from the phone camera and instant stock entry for warehouse workers.
Solutions.sol_09_desc: Mobile tracking tools that instantly report the visits, delivery statuses, and business steps taken by your field personnel to the center.
Solutions.sol_10_desc: Online stores coded from scratch specifically for your brand, not stuck in the limits of ready-made e-commerce packages, not slowing down even in high visitor traffic.
Solutions.sol_11_desc: Closed-circuit commercial portals offering special price lists, deferred payment options, current account, and risk tracking for your sub-dealers.
Solutions.sol_12_desc: Infrastructures that instantly synchronize your stores such as Trendyol, Hepsiburada, Amazon, and cargo and automatic e-invoice systems from a single panel.
Solutions.sol_13_desc: Preparing professional designs suitable for your brand identity on platforms like Instagram and LinkedIn, and managing content strategies that will connect with your target audience.
Solutions.sol_14_desc: Digital catalog systems where your customers or dealers can instantly see your current products, prices, and technical details, eliminating printed brochure costs.
Solutions.sol_15_desc: Secure corporate communication networks offering closed-to-outside, instant messaging, and file sharing for your own dealers or personnel.

Chat.title_2: WHAT WE CAN DO FOR YOU
Chat.subtitle: Select your industry and discover how digitalization can transform your business.
Chat.select_to_start: ↑ Select a sector from above to start
Chat.sector_1_q: We have losses on the production line, our ERP system is clunky. What does digitalization bring us?
Chat.sector_1_a: Paper-based production tracking causes you to lose 15% in waste and time every month. With our custom IoT-supported production tracking software, you can see machine downtimes instantly and eliminate inefficiency.
Chat.sector_1_f1_label: Can we integrate into our current ERP?
Chat.sector_1_f1_q: We have an old ERP that we currently use. Can it be integrated into this?
Chat.sector_1_f1_a: Absolutely. You don't have to throw away your old systems. By building API bridges, we connect the modern interface we wrote to your clunky system.
Chat.sector_1_f2_label: Workers on the field can't use complex screens
Chat.sector_1_f2_q: Workers on the field can't use complex screens, what should we do?
Chat.sector_1_f2_a: That's exactly why you should stay away from packaged software. We design special screens for field personnel that consist of only 2 large buttons, zero fault tolerant, and tablet compatible.
Chat.sector_2_q: Managing seasonal fluctuations and bookings is very difficult.
Chat.sector_2_a: With our AI-supported reservation management system developed specifically for you, we minimize gaps and increase your profitability.
Chat.sector_2_f1_label: How do we get rid of paying commissions?
Chat.sector_2_f1_q: We pay very high commissions to platforms.
Chat.sector_2_f1_a: By creating your own digital brand, you reach the customer directly with Google ads and SEO. Every booking from your own website means zero commission.
Chat.sector_2_f2_q: We have many foreign customers, how do we overcome the language barrier?
Chat.sector_2_f2_a: Our systems work with automatic multi-language support. We detect the customer's browser language and instantly provide a flawless experience in their own language.
Chat.sector_3_q: We want to increase customer satisfaction and create loyal customers.
Chat.sector_3_a: We build digital hotel management systems where your guests can solve all their needs from check-in to check-out with a single click from their mobile phones.
Chat.sector_3_f1_q: Is it compatible with our current hotel program?
Chat.sector_3_f1_a: Yes, with API integration, it works seamlessly and fully compatible with your current structure and hotel management systems.
Chat.sector_3_f2_label: Does the guest have to download the app?
Chat.sector_3_f2_q: Guests may not want to download an app on vacation.
Chat.sector_3_f2_a: With the PWA (Progressive Web App) technology we developed, usage starts instantly via the QR code in the room without the need to download.
Chat.sector_4_q: We pour a lot of money into listing sites. Is there a way out of this?
Chat.sector_4_a: Of course there is. You work for those platforms with commissions and listing fees. We build you your own portfolio property with a niche domain name, advanced map integration, and SEO infrastructure.
Chat.sector_4_f1_q: Why should customers come to our site instead of listing platforms?
Chat.sector_4_f1_a: We carry you to the 1st rank on Google not only with your name but also with target keywords. Thanks to our permanent SEO architecture, the customer reaches you directly without burning your ad budget.
Chat.sector_4_f2_q: Is it difficult to enter and update listings?
Chat.sector_4_f2_a: Thanks to the management panel we wrote specifically for you, you can enter listings in 10 seconds, crop photos, and publish them instantly, even from your phone.
Chat.sector_5_q: Construction site tracking, material management, and subcontractor accounts are getting very confusing.
Chat.sector_5_a: We develop custom SaaS software where you can monitor all your construction site operations instantly from a single screen. Follow up on which material went where, how much progress payment which subcontractor received, all from your pocket.
Chat.sector_5_f1_label: Is data entry from the field difficult?
Chat.sector_5_f1_q: Engineers and foremen are constantly in the field, not in front of the computer.
Chat.sector_5_f1_a: Thanks to our fully mobile-compatible field forms, they can add photos and notes in seconds from their smartphones. Data drops into the center instantly.
Chat.sector_5_f2_q: Can we see the profit/loss status of the project instantly?
Chat.sector_5_f2_a: With our advanced financial module, you can monitor your budget and realized costs instantly with live graphics.
Chat.sector_6_q: Delivery commissions are very high and we can't create loyal customers.
Chat.sector_6_a: You are melting your own profit with the 30% commissions you pay to food platforms. When we establish a special order infrastructure and WhatsApp bot integration for your brand, you make commission-free sales.
Chat.sector_6_f1_label: How do we attract the customer to our own site?
Chat.sector_6_f1_q: Why should the customer use our site instead of the platform?
Chat.sector_6_f1_a: You get the first orders from the platforms, but you draw the customer to your own system with the discounted QR codes we put in the package.
Chat.sector_6_f2_q: We are very busy on Friday nights, can the system handle it?
Chat.sector_6_f2_a: We install our systems on global cloud infrastructures that automatically scale during instant traffic increases. We guarantee response times of less than a second.
Chat.sector_7_q: We get lost among patient records, appointments, and test results.
Chat.sector_7_a: We build a secure patient portal where your patients can book their own appointments, view past tests, and send you messages. Operation time in clinics is reduced by 50%.
Chat.sector_7_f1_q: How do you ensure the security of patient data?
Chat.sector_7_f1_a: We provide maximum data security and privacy with end-to-end encryption and fully GDPR-compliant isolated cloud infrastructures.
Chat.sector_7_f2_q: Can we make remote video calls with patients?
Chat.sector_7_f2_a: With our secure WebRTC infrastructure integrated into your own platform, you can provide online consulting directly through the system without needing 3rd party software.
Chat.sector_8_q: We can't keep track of hundreds of customers, policies/tickets, and renewal dates.
Chat.sector_8_a: With our agency-specific CRM automation, the system automatically tracks renewal dates and sends SMS/Email when the day approaches. You leave manual tracking and focus entirely on sales.
Chat.sector_8_f1_q: Do notifications go to the customer automatically?
Chat.sector_8_f1_a: Yes, personalized automatic reminders are delivered in seconds via WhatsApp, SMS, or Email.
Chat.sector_8_f2_q: Can we track the sub-agencies affiliated with us?
Chat.sector_8_f2_a: With the advanced authorization module, you can give special panels to your sub-agencies and calculate sales and commissions automatically.

Teklif.subtitle: Briefly describe your idea or needs, and our expert team will call you within 1 hour to discuss the details.
Teklif.success_message: Your project details have reached our systems. Our relevant team will contact you shortly.
Teklif.form_message_placeholder: Ex: We need a website with an appointment system...
